overall.description: First-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit plazas, digital billboards, and futuristic traffic. The footage appears to be from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing a high-density urban environment with reflective wet surfaces and vibrant artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza beneath elevated transit track

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rain-soaked plaza, passing benches and palm trees while approaching the circular kiosk

entered.detail: curved monorail track structure running overhead with support pillars
circular building wrapped in bright purple and yellow 'Mix It Up' advertisements
modern white concrete seating planters with dark tops
tropical palm trees in large planters lining the walkway
large illuminated screen displaying advertisements in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking through a rain-slicked pedestrian plaza beneath an elevated transit track. A circular kiosk with bright 'Mix It Up' advertisements dominates the right side, surrounded by concrete benches and palm trees. The area is sparsely populated with neon lights reflecting off the wet ground.

events.description: exiting the semi-covered plaza into the open street intersection with visible crosswalk

agents.ego_description: moving from the plaza toward the street crosswalk, passing a couple embracing near the kiosk edge

notable_agents.action: couple embracing and kissing on the sidewalk near the street edge

entered.detail: zebra-striped pedestrian crossing visible ahead on the wet street
orange metal railings separating pedestrian and vehicle areas
tall digital advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: Leaving the plaza behind, the scene opens into a wider intersection. A couple embraces on the right sidewalk as the camera approaches a crosswalk. Large digital billboards illuminate the background while the elevated transit track curves overhead to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with active traffic

events.description: crossing the street as futuristic vehicles pass by on the road
completing the crosswalk and turning to walk parallel to the street flow

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet asphalt street, navigating between traffic barriers while futuristic cars drive past

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green coat and boots crossing the street in the opposite direction

entered.detail: low orange metal barriers lining the edge of the crosswalk
massive illuminated advertisement screen displaying 'All Night Every Night' text
sleek black and silver cars driving on the wet road with neon reflections

segments.scene_description: Crossing the rain-slicked street amidst sparse traffic of futuristic vehicles. Orange traffic railings line the crossing path. A pedestrian in a green coat crosses in the opposite direction. Massive digital billboards tower above the street displaying vibrant advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with overhead digital signage

events.description: rain intensity increases with more visible streaks falling through the light

agents.ego_description: walking along the red-paved sidewalk beneath massive overhead billboards, passing street furniture and planters

entered.detail: large curved digital screens extending over the sidewalk displaying advertisements
modern glass and steel building front with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Walking along a red-paved commercial sidewalk beneath enormous overhead digital billboards. The street runs parallel on the right with continuing traffic of futuristic vehicles. The environment is densely packed with neon signage, glass facades, and tropical plants in planters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet, rain-slicked pedestrian plaza into the heart of a densely packed, neon-lit commercial district. It begins beneath an elevated transit track, passing a circular kiosk with bright advertisements and palm trees reflecting in the wet concrete. As the camera leaves the plaza, the space opens into a wider intersection where a couple embraces on the sidewalk before the view shifts toward a crosswalk. The scene then transitions across the rain-slicked street, moving past orange traffic railings and futuristic vehicles toward towering digital billboards that dominate the skyline. Finally, the path leads onto a red-paved sidewalk lined with glass facades and tropical plants, where the environment becomes an immersive corridor of vibrant neon signage and constant urban traffic.
